title: ixora fulgens var. lanceolata
intro: Ixora fulgens var. lanceolata, also known as the Flame of the Woods, is a flowering plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ixora fulgens var. lanceolata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
